intro.title: Welcome to Ordinay
intro.subtitle: Set up your workspace in a few simple steps

progress.localDataNote: All data is stored locally on your device

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.subtitle: Tell us about yourself to personalize your workspace

firm.title: Firm Information
firm.subtitle: Add details about your practice or firm

security.title: Workspace Security
security.subtitle: Protect your workspace with a password lock

hints.editLater: You can edit these details later in Settings
hints.skipFirm: You can skip this step and add firm details later in Settings.

enable.title: Enable workspace lock
enable.description: Require a password to access your workspace

lock.warning: If you forget this password, there is no recovery option. You will need to reset the app to regain access.
lock.disabledNotice: Without a lock, anyone with access to this device can view your workspace data. You can enable this later in Settings.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
errors.general: Failed to complete setup. Please try again.
